input: Run survey design on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected survey design output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the survey design workflow

input: Apply survey design to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive survey design analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to survey design

expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis
